titleStmt.title: SII 5.435: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 435. (A.R. No. 144 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumukappaṭi kalveṭṭa piracātam ceytaruḷiṉapaṭi . sarvvalokasamutpattisthitisaṁhārakāraṇam śāsanaṁ śāśva
tam śambhoḥ śrīvrī hiritiRead vratiºvāsinaḥ . Ādicaṇḍeśvarājñeyam . nam pūntoṭṭam ceyvāril tiruccāykkāṭuṭaiyāṉuk
ku nam viṭṭil vaṭapākattil nāmirukkiṟa Iṭattukkuta tāṉ pūntoṭṭam Ākkukaikku ceytuvarukiṟa pūntoṭṭam vaṭa
vellai nam gau rikku periyanāyaṉ ceykiṟa pūntoṭṭattukku teṟkum kiḻellai Ivaṉ ceykiṟa pūkkuḻikku merkku
m teṉṉellai pattirakāḷi yirukkiṟa Iṭattukku vaṭakkum melellai cāliyar maṉaikku kiḻakkum Āka nāṉkellaik
ku Uḷpaṭṭa nilam pūntoṭṭamāka ceytu pūppaṟittu toṭuttu namakku Attacāmam śāśva tiyāka Iruntu tevai yiṟu
kka taṉakku civaṉattukku nam Aṭukkaḷaippuṟam kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu piramatecam civallavaccathurvveta maṅkalattil
vaṭapiṭākai paṭappukuṟicciyil cariyāka koṇṭaikkaṇṇāṟṟil talaiccey nilam Orumāvum pūntoṭṭapuṟamāka
kaikkoṇṭu pūvaḷantu tevaiyum ceyka Innilam Orumāvum pūntoṭṭapuṟamāka nammakaṉār vikkiramapāṇṭi
yatevarkku Aiñcāvatu pacāṉamutal Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu nam kāriyañ ceykiṟa paḻantivarāyaṉ collukaiyi
l Ivvāṇṭu pacāṉamutal tāṉum taṉ cantāṉattārum cantirātittavaṟ pūvaḷantu tevaiyum ceytu kāṇiyāka kaik
koṇṭu Aṉupavikka . Appaṭi kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittukoḷka . svasti śrī Ivai kuṇṭur braha ccakkara
vatti Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 5.435 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
